articles.title: Once envious of the new offense the Eagles will run, Lane Johnson won't have to be anymore
articles.description: The Eagles' star right tackle is in a weird spot – learning an offense he's always envied, for the first time, at 36 years old and possibly in his last season. He's embracing it.
